changes: Holy Sheltron: Damage reduction of the Knight's Resolve effect reduced from 20% to 15%.
Onslaught: Base potency increased from 400 to 500; Maximum potency increased from 4,000 to 5,000.
Orogeny: Base potency increased from 800 to 1,000; Maximum potency increased from 8,000 to 10,000.
Bloodspiller: Base potency increased from 4,000 to 6,000; Maximum potency threshold changed from HP below 20% to HP below 25%.
Eventide: Base potency increased from 1 to 10,000.
Burst Strike: Potency increased from 6,000 to 7,000.
Hypervelocity: Potency increased from 2,000 to 3,000.
Junction Tank bonus: Barrier potency increased from 5,000 to 6,000.
Junction DPS bonus: Potency increase changed from 4,000 to 5,000.
Junction Healer bonus: Cure potency increased from 3,000 to 4,000.
Seiton Tenchu: Unsealed Seiton Tenchu effect duration reduced from 10 to 8 seconds.
Blast Charge: Now grants movement speed increase when Overheated.
Aether Mortar: Potency increased from 4,000 to 6,000; Barrier potency increased from 4,000 to 6,000.
Honing Dance: Potency increased from 3,000 to 4,000.
Reverse Cascade: Potency increased from 5,000 to 6,000.
Fountainfall: Potency increased from 7,000 to 8,000.
Saber Dance: Damage bonus increased from 5% to 10%.
Burst: Barrier potency reduced from 16,000 to 12,000.
Superflare: Umbral Freeze now applies Heavy (1 stack), Bind (2 stacks), or Deep Freeze (3 stacks).
Fester: Base potency increased from 3,000 to 4,000; Maximum potency increased from 6,000 to 8,000.
Gravity II: Heavy effect now only applied to the first target.
Gravity II (after Double Cast): Bind effect now only applied to the first target.

new_content.name: Data Center Travel
new_content.description: System allowing players to travel between data centers.
